title: Demicot silk
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Demicot_silk.png|thumb|right]]
'''Demicot silk''' was a brown fabric used in formal wear. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] had a formal robe made from it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']]

{{Interlang
|pl=Jedwab demikotański
}}
